user_system_path: Seam #411 — the Sources screen shows the Microsoft connected account as a broken raw Azure guest UPN (b-kapp_outlook.com#EXT#@tenant.onmicrosoft.com) instead of the real email (b-kapp@outlook.com). Both capture paths store me.mail || me.userPrincipalName, so a guest/B2B account with empty mail lands the mangled UPN. Fix: a pure normalizeMicrosoftAccountEmail() in lib/ui/provider-display.ts that recovers the real email from an #EXT# UPN (case-insensitive; clean emails pass through), applied at the display (app/dashboard/page.tsx — repairs the already-stored row with no DB migration) and at both capture points (callback + sync) so new connects store clean. Deterministic, free, no schema/data migration. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Seam #411: one pure helper in lib/ui/provider-display.ts + three call sites (display in app/dashboard/page.tsx, capture in app/api/microsoft/callback/route.ts and lib/sync/microsoft-sync.ts) + unit tests + control-plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**), no DB data migration, no dependency changes (package.json / lock).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build && npm run lint
required_browser_proof: Harness-proven (lib/ui/__tests__/provider-display.test.ts: guest UPN upper/lower #EXT#, clean-email passthrough, empty fallback, no-underscore + multi-underscore edges; existing microsoft callback test green). Live owner validation: open the Sources screen and confirm the Microsoft row now reads b-kapp@outlook.com instead of the #EXT# UPN.
acceptance_condition: The Sources screen renders the Microsoft account as the real email (recovered from the #EXT# guest UPN), the existing stored row is repaired at display with no DB migration, new connects store the clean email, clean (Google) emails are unaffected, and gate:continuity + build + lint are green.
anti_regression_checks: clean emails (Google) pass through normalizeMicrosoftAccountEmail untouched
no schema or DB data migration
stop_condition: Stop when the draft PR for #411 is open with CI green, or BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT on owner-side Sources-screen validation.
next_command: Owner: open the Sources screen and confirm the Microsoft row reads b-kapp@outlook.com. Then resume the live send/attachment validation (ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND is on; confirm RESEND_API_KEY; connect a real source so a genuine move generates).
